pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly creates patient with ptfname='Maria' if not present, and task.json description.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly creates patient with ptlname='Santos' if not present, and task.json description.
task.json description explicitly requires the user to set the Date to '2025-01-15'.
task.json description explicitly requires the Subject/Description to be 'Hypertension Follow-Up Plan'.
These keywords are directly present in the expected letter body defined in the task.json description.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a follow-up letter for a synthetically generated patient, Maria Santos, who is inserted into the FreeMED database by the setup script. The letter must have the exact date '2025-01-15', the subject 'Hypertension Follow-Up Plan', and its body contains the text provided in the instructions which includes the keywords 'hypertension', 'blood pressure', 'follow-up', and 'medication'.
